description: Complete frontend intake of content_v2-derived study, dictionary, and UI display data contracts

tasks.title: Inventory frontend data-flow and path coupling
tasks.description: Map study, dictionary, grammar, learning-library, PRG, and production asset flows. Identify every direct production path coupling and classify required vs legacy compatibility.

tasks.title: Define frontend v2 resolver contract
tasks.description: Define the minimal adapter/resolver contract that lets frontend consume v2-derived production artifacts without binding UI-facing repositories to raw package layout.

tasks.title: Refactor study lesson discovery and loading
tasks.description: Move study lesson metadata/body path resolution behind the accepted resolver boundary and remove hardcoded modular lesson discovery as an independent truth source.

tasks.title: Align dictionary runtime to v2 contract
tasks.description: Unify dictionary hub, overlay, and lesson lookup around one v2-aware adapter. Keep legacy packaged files only as an explicit compatibility layer.

tasks.title: Add real Korean v2 production validation
tasks.description: Add or update frontend tests to load a real Korean v2-derived fixture and validate lesson display, dictionary lookup, and translation/hydration basics.

tasks.title: Verify PRG/frontend production artifact handoff
tasks.description: Update PRG/frontend contract validation so release artifacts are derived from global_manifest/release manifest and match frontend resolver expectations.
